code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut has_pos = false
  mut max_val = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  mut started = false

  while i <= n
    mut b = 0
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      b = 32
    end

    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    let is_plus = b == 43

    if in_num and is_digit
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if in_num
      let final_val = if neg
        0 - val
      else
        val
      end
      if final_val > 0
        if not has_pos
          has_pos = true
          max_val = final_val
        else if final_val > max_val
          max_val = final_val
        end
      end
      in_num = false
      neg = false
      val = 0
      if is_minus or is_plus
        in_num = true
        neg = is_minus
      else if is_digit
        in_num = true
        val = b - 48
      end
    else
      if is_minus or is_plus
        in_num = true
        neg = is_minus
        val = 0
      else if is_digit
        in_num = true
        neg = false
        val = b - 48
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
    started = true
  end

  if has_pos
    println("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
